positive: A symmetrical, stylized illustration of a mystical celestial woodland at twilight. The central composition features giant, luminous bioluminescent flora and crystalline trees, forming a glowing gateway. The style must be highly detailed linework with sharp, clean silhouettes against a deep sapphire and indigo background. Emphasize strong contrast and neon accents of electric blue, emerald green, and magenta. The aesthetic is a blend of Art Nouveau symmetry and modern geometric vector art, suitable for high-quality textile printing. Rule of thirds, perfect for apparel print.
